  Findings: 12

No supported consumers found.

Findings
  ERROR (5)
    component-01
      RTC001 Required variable not provided
        at rules/rtc001.py:1:1 | target=- key=- phase=runtime
        suggestion: Provide the variable to every selected target in the required phase, or
                    explicitly make the requirement optional.
    component-02
      RTC002 Secret has a literal value
        at rules/rtc002.py:2:1 | target=- key=- phase=runtime
        suggestion: Replace the literal with an empty or approved placeholder, pass-through
                    reference, or secret-backed delivery.
    component-03
      RTC003 Private-key content detected
        at rules/rtc003.py:3:1 | target=- key=- phase=runtime
        suggestion: Remove the private-key content from the repository and rotate the affected key
                    outside runtime-contract.
    component-09
      RTC009 Bulk delivery cannot be verified
        at rules/rtc009.py:9:1 | target=- key=- phase=runtime
        suggestion: Add a statically verifiable key or an explicit valueless provides declaration
                    for the target.
    component-10
      RTC010 Delivery phase does not match
        at rules/rtc010.py:10:1 | target=- key=- phase=runtime
        suggestion: Move or duplicate delivery into the required build or runtime phase.
  WARNING (5)
    component-04
      RTC004 Variable is not documented
        at rules/rtc004.py:4:1 | target=- key=- phase=runtime
        suggestion: Declare the variable in the component's documentation source without adding a
                    real secret value.
    component-05
      RTC005 Declaration has no consumer
        at rules/rtc005.py:5:1 | target=- key=- phase=runtime
        suggestion: Remove the stale declaration or confirm and document the unsupported consumption
                    pattern.
    component-06
      RTC006 Variable reference is dynamic
        at rules/rtc006.py:6:1 | target=- key=- phase=runtime
        suggestion: Use a statically named access or document the limitation; runtime-contract will
                    not execute code or guess the name.
    component-07
      RTC007 Static defaults conflict
        at rules/rtc007.py:7:1 | target=- key=- phase=runtime
        suggestion: Choose one intended default contract and align every static declaration and
                    consumer.
    component-11
      RTC011 Custom Settings source is dynamic
        at rules/rtc011.py:11:1 | target=- key=- phase=runtime
        suggestion: Expose a static field alias or prefix, or document the custom source as an
                    intentional analysis limitation.
  INFO (2)
    component-08
      RTC008 Optional variable not provided
        at rules/rtc008.py:8:1 | target=- key=- phase=runtime
        suggestion: No action is required when omission is intentional; otherwise add the matching
                    delivery.
    component-12
      RTC012 Kubernetes resource is unsupported
        at rules/rtc012.py:12:1 | target=- key=- phase=runtime
        suggestion: Use a supported plain manifest for analysis or assess the unsupported resource
                    with its native tooling.

Result: complete — 0 consumers, 0 config keys
